name: Superheavy Samurai Motorbike
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>超</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>重</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>武</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>む</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>バイ－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｑ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ク</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If you have no Spells/Traps in your GY: You can discard this card; add 1 "Superheavy Samurai" monster from your Deck to your hand, except "Superheavy Samurai Motorbike". You can only use this effect of "Superheavy Samurai Motorbike" once per turn. Once per turn: You can target 1 Machine monster you control; increase its Level by 2.
mnst_eff: If you have no Spells/Traps in your GY: You can discard this card; add 1 "Superheavy Samurai" monster from your Deck to your hand, except "Superheavy Samurai Motorbike".
